name: Thomas' Chicken Stroganoff C/p
recipeIngredient: 6 green onions, white part only -- sliced
1 1/2 cups sour cream, regular or low-fat
12 ounces egg noodles, cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone and skin the chicken breasts. Cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Combine all ingredients, except sour cream and flour, in a 4 to 5 quart crockpot.
3. Cook on low for approximately 6 to 7 hours, stirring once or twice if possible.
4. Increase heat to high. Mix sour cream and flour together.
5. Stir some of the hot liquid from the crockpot into the sour cream mixture, then stir the sour cream mixture into the slow cooker, mixing well.
6. Cover and cook on high for 30 minutes more or until slightly thickened.
7. Serve over cooked noodles or stir noodles into Chicken Stroganoff. Sprinkle reserved sliced green onions over top.
